category_sources: Official LilyPond documentation describes GNU LilyPond as a music engraving program.
display_name_sources: Official site and documentation use LilyPond capitalization.
docs_sources: Official lilypond.org documentation for v2.26 matches the source_facts.version major/minor line.
repo_sources: Official LilyPond Contributor's Guide says the official source repository is hosted by GNU Savannah at git.savannah.gnu.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a music engraving system.
source_facts.executables lists lilypond and converters such as musicxml2ly and midi2ly.
